_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Craniotomy and evacuation of hematoma (extradural)/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Craniotomy and evacuation of hematoma (extradural) with fixation of fracture of long bone
procedure_name: Extradural hematoma along with fixation of fracture of single long bone
clinical_indications: An epidural hematoma (EDH) is an extra-axial collection of blood within the potential space between the outer layer of the dura mater and the inner table of the skull. It is confined by the lateral sutures (especially the coronal sutures) where the dura inserts. It is a life-threatening condition, which may require immediate intervention and can be associated with significant morbidity and mortality if left untreated.
Hematoma volume greater than 30 ml regardless of Glasgow coma scale score (GCS)
GCS less than 9 with pupillary abnormalities like anisocoria

preauth.label: Clinical notes detailing the injury and need for surgery
Medico legal case report/ FIR copy of accident
X-ray/ CT report of fractured limb

claim.label: Post op X-ray film and report of skull

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes detail accident, signs & symptoms, indication for surgery, and planned line of treatment?
Medico legal report/ FIR copy of the accident submitted?
X-ray/ CT report suggest fracture of one long bone?
X-ray/ CT report suggest fracture of more than one long bone?
CT/ MRI brain report suggestive of extradural hematoma?

cpd_claim.q: Detailed Discharge Summary mentioning date of follow-up submitted?
Post op X-ray film of the skull demonstrate craniotomy?

common_queries: CT/MRI brain report not suggestive of extradural hematoma
X-ray/ CT report not suggesting fracture of a single long bone
Clinical notes are missing or do not detail the injury, need for surgery, or planned treatment
Medico legal report/ FIR copy of accident not submitted
Post-operative X-ray film of the skull not demonstrating craniotomy
